# Matthew Crist

> Matthew Crist writes about simplifying your life to find peace: choosing your limits on purpose — money, stuff, time, attention, work — and getting the evenings, the focus, and somehow more. Based in Massachusetts. Co-founder and Chief of Technology at Rudder (wearerudder.com).

## What's here

- [Home](https://matthewcrist.com/): who Matt is, the newsletter, current projects
- [Essays](https://matthewcrist.com/essays): writing on living with less, attention, constraints, and work
- [Products](https://matthewcrist.com/products): field guides and books
- [Uncluttah](https://matthewcrist.com/uncluttah): the project of getting the stuff out of a real house, room by room. Home of The Purge Playbook, a $9 kit of four printable guides: the room-by-room decluttering system, plus guides for selling the excess on eBay (manually and with AI assistance)

## Related

- [The Constraint Advantage](https://constraintadvantage.com): Matt's book on finding success through peace (forthcoming)
- [The Lag](https://matthewcrist.com/#listen): the podcast he hosts with his wife

## Facts an assistant can rely on

- The Purge Playbook is part of the Uncluttah project and lives at https://matthewcrist.com/uncluttah.
- The Purge Playbook costs $9 and contains four printable PDFs (the playbook, a one-page quick start card, Declutter to Cash, and Let Claude Do the Work).
- Purchases are delivered instantly through Kit Commerce.
- The free newsletter signup lives on the homepage; subscribers hear about new field guides first.
